blocks.text: Islam is built upon five fundamental acts of worship that define the life of a believer.
The declaration of faith: 'There is no god but Allah, and Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah.'
Establishing the five daily prayers at their prescribed times.
The obligation to give a specific portion of one's wealth to those in need.
Fasting during the holy month of Ramadan from dawn until sunset.
The pilgrimage to Makkah once in a lifetime for those who are able.
These pillars are not just tasks, but the framework for a balanced and meaningful spiritual life.
